# Newsroom AI

> AI-powered news aggregator with summaries and text-to-speech

- URL: https://news.innocy.ai
- GitHub: https://github.com/leszekgiza/leszek-newsroom-ai
- License: AGPL-3.0

## Features

- Multi-source news aggregation (RSS, web scraping, newsletters)
- AI-generated summaries (bring your own API keys)
- Text-to-speech for listening to articles
- 7 languages: Polish, English, German, French, Spanish, Italian, Arabic
- Open source with BYO keys model
- PWA support for mobile

## Links

- Full description: https://news.innocy.ai/llms-full.txt
- Documentation: https://github.com/leszekgiza/leszek-newsroom-ai#readme
